glosses.en: to walk (a dog); to take for a walk
glosses.ja: 散歩させる; 散歩する

sentences.target: Je promène le chien tous les matins.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁɔmɛn lə ʃjɛ̃ tu le matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je promène le chien tous les matins.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁɔmɛn lə ʃjɛ̃ tu le matɛ̃/
translations.en: I walk the dog every morning.
translations.es: Paseo al perro todas las mañanas.
translations.de: Ich gehe jeden Morgen mit dem Hund spazieren.
translations.it: Porto a spasso il cane ogni mattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我每天早上都带狗去散步。
translations.yue: 我每日朝早都帶隻狗去散步。
translations.pt: Levo o cachorro para passear todas as manhãs.
translations.he: אני מטייל עם הכלב כל בוקר.
translations.vi: Mỗi sáng tôi dắt chó đi dạo.
translations.nl: Ik laat de hond elke ochtend uit.
translations.hi: मैं हर सुबह कुत्ते को टहलाने ले जाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Codziennie rano wyprowadzam psa na spacer.
translations.el: Βγάζω βόλτα τον σκύλο κάθε πρωί.
translations.id: Setiap pagi saya mengajak anjing jalan-jalan.
translations.sv: Jag går ut med hunden varje morgon.
translations.ro: Scot câinele la plimbare în fiecare dimineață.
translations.ja: 毎朝犬を散歩させます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; means ‘to walk (someone/something)’. Takes a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular, introduces the noun ‘chien’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘promène’.
Quantifier determiner, masculine plural; modifies ‘les matins’ to express habitual frequency.
Definite article, plural; determines ‘matins’.
Common noun, masculine plural; temporal complement with ‘tous les’.

sentences.target: Tu promènes les enfants au parc.

translations.fr: Tu promènes les enfants au parc.
translations.en: You walk the children to the park.
translations.es: Llevas a los niños al parque.
translations.de: Du gehst mit den Kindern in den Park.
translations.pt: Você leva as crianças ao parque.
translations.vi: Bạn dẫn bọn trẻ ra công viên.
translations.nl: Je brengt de kinderen naar het park.
translations.hi: तुम बच्चों को पार्क तक लेकर जाते हो.
translations.sv: Du går med barnen till parken.
translations.ro: Îi duci pe copii în parc.
translations.ja: 子どもたちを公園まで連れて行きます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular (informal).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive ‘to walk (someone)’.
Definite article, plural; determines ‘enfants’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘promènes’.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with masculine singular article ‘le’ (à + le → au); introduces the prepositional complement ‘au parc’ (destination/location).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.

translations.en: We're going to take the baby for a walk.
translations.es: Vamos a sacar a pasear al bebé.
translations.de: Wir gehen mit dem Baby spazieren.
translations.it: Andiamo a fare una passeggiata con il bambino.
translations.ru: Мы собираемся вывести малыша на прогулку.
translations.pt: Vamos levar o bebê para passear.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לקחת את התינוק לטיול.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sắp đưa em bé đi dạo.
translations.nl: We gaan met de baby wandelen.
translations.uk: Ми збираємося піти на прогулянку з немовлям.
translations.hi: हम बच्चे को टहलाने जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πάμε να βγάλουμε το μωρό βόλτα.
translations.nb: Vi skal gå en tur med babyen.
translations.sv: Vi ska ta med bebisen på en promenad.
translations.ro: Mergem să scoatem bebelușul la plimbare.
translations.da: Vi skal ud og gå en tur med babyen.
translations.ja: 赤ちゃんを散歩に連れて行くつもりです。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal pronoun (3rd person singular) often used colloquially for ‘we’; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the futur proche with an infinitive.
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the auxiliary ‘aller’ in futur proche.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines ‘bébé’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘promener’.

sentences.target: Nous promenons le bébé en poussette.

translations.fr: Nous promenons le bébé en poussette.
translations.en: We walk the baby in the stroller.
translations.es: Paseamos al bebé en el cochecito.
translations.de: Wir gehen mit dem Baby im Kinderwagen spazieren.
translations.it: Portiamo a spasso il bambino nel passeggino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们推着婴儿车带宝宝散步。
translations.yue: 我哋推住BB車帶個BB去散步。
translations.ru: Мы гуляем с младенцем в коляске.
translations.pt: Levamos o bebê para passear no carrinho.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đưa em bé đi dạo bằng xe đẩy.
translations.ar: نتمشى مع الرضيع في عربة الأطفال.
translations.nl: We wandelen met de baby in de kinderwagen.
translations.uk: Ми гуляємо з немовлям у візочку.
translations.hi: हम बच्चे को स्ट्रोलर में घुमाते हैं.
translations.el: Βγάζουμε βόλτα το μωρό με το καρότσι.
translations.nb: Vi går tur με babyen i barnevogn.
translations.id: Kami mengajak bayi jalan-jalan dengan kereta dorong.
translations.sv: Vi går med bebisen i barnvagnen.
translations.cs: Jdeme s miminkem v kočárku na procházku.
translations.da: Vi går tur med babyen i barnevognen.
translations.ja: ベビーカーで赤ちゃんを散歩させます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines ‘bébé’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘promenons’.
Preposition introducing the manner/instrument phrase ‘en poussette’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘en’.
